entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
entries.specific_competence: 1.5 Demonstrate mastery of the Internet, and basics of cyber security
entries.learning_activity: (a) Describe the concept of internet and cyber security (ethics, security, and privacy)
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion and Case study: Through group discussion and case study guide students to describe the concept of cyber security
entries.assessment: Clearly explain the concept of cyber security
entries.references: TIE, Computer Science for Secondary Schools Form Two: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education

entries.specific_competence: 1.5 Demonstrate mastery of the Internet, and basics of cyber security
entries.learning_activity: (b) Use Internet services (searching information, www, electronic mail)

entries.assessment: Confidently can use Internet service

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
entries.specific_competence: 1.5 Demonstrate mastery of the Internet, and basics of cyber security
entries.learning_activity: (c) Understand cyber security threats and related counter measures
teaching_learning_activities: TIPS: Through TIPS guide students to elaborate security threats and related counter measures
Case Study: Use case study for example to demonstrate threats and counter measures
entries.assessment: Clearly Elaborate security threats and related measures
entries.references: TIE, Computer Science for Secondary Schools Form Two: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
entries.specific_competence: 1.5 Demonstrate mastery of the Internet, and basics of cyber security
entries.learning_activity: (d) Evaluate ethical issues, related principles, and practices of cyber security
teaching_learning_activities: Case study: Using case study guide students to evaluate ethical issues
entries.assessment: Clearly evaluates issues and related policies governing ethics, security and privacy maintenance and troubleshooting of computer system
entries.references: TIE, Computer Science for Secondary Schools Form Two: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
entries.specific_competence: 1.5 Demonstrate mastery of the Internet, and basics of cyber security
entries.learning_activity: (e) Apply basic cyber security measures (passwords, safe browsing, netiquette)
teaching_learning_activities: Case study: Using case studies to guide students to apply basic cyber security measures.
Practical work: Students to do practical work to set password
entries.assessment: Confidently basic cyber security measures
entries.references: TIE, Computer Science for Secondary Schools Form Two: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
entries.specific_competence: 2.2 Demonstrate an understanding of basic principles of computer programming (using an appropriate structured programming language such as C, python, etc.)
entries.learning_activity: (a) Describe concept of programming language (categories, paradigm, generic structures)
teaching_learning_activities: TIPS, question and answer, and group discussion: Through TIPS, question and answer, and group discussion guide students to describe computer programming language
entries.assessment: Clearly explain the concept of programming language
resources: Computer installed with appropriate programming tools
entries.references: TIE, Computer Science for Secondary Schools Form Two: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education
